title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Dental Services Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Healthcare Sector
thesis: Sudden spikes in emergency dental service searches reflect rising consumer health issues and stress, often preceding increased healthcare utilization. Higher demand for emergency dental services signals healthcare sector revenue growth potential.
signal_logic: Trigger when weekly Google Trends search interest for 'emergency dental services' rises by more than 25% compared to 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: Trigger when weekly Google Trends search interest for 'emergency dental services' rises by more than 25% compared to 4-week average Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when the search interest falls below the 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health-related search interest frequently fluctuates weekly due to seasonal and episodic stress factors.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for emergency dental services signals consumer stress lifting healthcare sector
schema.behavior: Sudden spikes in emergency dental service searches reflect rising consumer health issues and stress, often preceding increased healthcare utilization.

market_impact.rationale: Higher demand for emergency dental services signals healthcare sector revenue growth potential.

trade_logic.entry: Trigger when weekly Google Trends search interest for 'emergency dental services' rises by more than 25% compared to 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when the search interest falls below the 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Health-related search interest frequently fluctuates weekly due to seasonal and episodic stress factors.

title: Daily Uptick In Freight Logistics Port Container Volume Deviation Signals Industrial Sector Momentum Burst
thesis: Abrupt daily increases in container throughput beyond normal volatility indicate accelerating industrial demand and supply chain activity. Increased freight activity signals expanding industrial production and shipping demand.
signal_logic: Enter when daily container volume exceeds 3 standard deviations above its 20-day moving average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter when daily container volume exceeds 3 standard deviations above its 20-day moving average Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when volume normalizes within 1 standard deviation
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Port container volume daily data via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily container volume spikes happen frequently due to shipping schedule variations and demand surges.

market_impact.rationale: Increased freight activity signals expanding industrial production and shipping demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter when daily container volume exceeds 3 standard deviations above its 20-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when volume normalizes within 1 standard deviation

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily container volume spikes happen frequently due to shipping schedule variations and demand surges.

title: Daily Jump In Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Short-term Freight Logistics Disruption Risk
thesis: Sudden increases in seismic events near key ports typically disrupt freight flows temporarily, impacting industrial supply chains. Port disruptions reduce industrial throughput and increase costs for freight logistics.
signal_logic: Enter short if daily earthquake count near top 5 US ports exceeds 2 standard deviations above 30-day average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short if daily earthquake count near top 5 US ports exceeds 2 standard deviations above 30-day average Exit: Exit after 7 days or when activity normalizes
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake activity daily data via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity fluctuates with aftershock clusters and tectonic movements.
